meta.title: Semi-Quantitative Cyber-Physical Risk Assessments
meta.description:
Sinclair Koelemij has been involved in addressing risk in a variety for over four decades. He proposes the best risk assessment approach is between qualitative and quantitative risk assessment, a semi-qualitative risk assessment. He uses a reactor in a chemical plant to demonstrate this assessment approach.

In addition to learning about this approach, this is a good video to learn some of the engineering terms and techniques for process safety, risk and mitigation such as ALARP, LOPA, ROPA, and more.
